title: Automated Windows Event Log Analyzer (Chainsaw)
description: Developed a Python script to automate `chainsaw.exe`, a powerful tool for rapidly searching and carving Windows Event Logs. This script streamlines threat hunting by identifying suspicious activities and attacker TTPs from massive log files.

title: Rocky Linux OS Hardening & Penetration Testing
description: Conducted OS hardening (MFA, firewalld, account policies) on a Rocky Linux 9 VM and validated security by performing comparative penetration tests using Metasploit before and after hardening.

title: Web and Email Server Hardening (Apache & Postfix/Dovecot)
description: Configured Apache, Postfix, and Dovecot servers, secured communication with SSL/TLS encryption, and tested them for vulnerabilities using offensive tools and packet analysis.

title: SIEM Lab (Home SOC) Build
description: Built a home SOC lab using the Elastic Stack (Elastic SIEM) to centralize logging, monitor endpoints, and detect simulated attacks in real-time. Practiced Blue Team detection engineering.

title: Network Traffic Capturing Tool (Python)
description: Created a command-line interface (CLI) tool in Python to capture and analyze network packets, demonstrating foundational understanding of network protocols.

title: Keystroke Tracker (Ethical Keylogger in Python)
description: Developed an ethical keylogger in Python to explore malware persistence and data capture techniques, emphasizing defensive programming and security awareness.
